parameters.name: X-Gusto-API-Version
parameters.description: Determines the date-based API version associated with your API call. If none is provided, your application's [minimum API version](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/api-versioning#minimum-api-version) is used.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The time period for which to retrieve contractor payments

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The time period for which to retrieve contractor payments. If left empty, defaults to today's date.

parameters.name: contractor_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the contractor. When specified, will load all payments for that contractor.

parameters.name: group_by_date
parameters.description: Display contractor payments results group by check date if set to true.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page that is requested. When unspecified, will load all objects unless endpoint forces pagination.

parameters.name: per
parameters.description: Number of objects per page. For majority of endpoints will default to 25
